title: Why More Money Means More Stress?

scenes.text: Many believe that earning more money leads to fewer financial worries.
scenes.label: MYTH

scenes.text: In reality, increased income can lead to complex financial challenges.
scenes.label: TRUTH

scenes.text: Don't get trapped by the myth of easy living with money!
scenes.label: CALLOUT
scenes.query: Why More Money Means More Stress?

scenes.text: Follow and your future rich self will thank you.
scenes.label: CTA

description: Many believe more money equals less stress, but is it true? Discover the reality behind this common myth! Follow us for a deeper dive into money psychology.
